title: Thavarige Baa Thangi
desc: Lakshmi faces trouble when her in-laws hurl a false accusation at her. However, Lakshmi's brother is determined to stand by her side.

title: Rowdy Aliya
desc: Raja, a smart young man, meets Rani, an arrogant and selfish young woman. Raja decides to teach Rani a lesson; however, he gradually falls in love with her.

title: Yuddha Kaanda
desc: A corrupt advocate falsely accuses a commoner of murder and sends him to the gallows. Eventually, the commoner's son becomes a lawyer and embarks on a quest for revenge.

title: Chennamma IPS
desc: When an honest police officer, Chennamma, learns about Appanna, a gangster, and his cruel son's tyranny, she decides to kill them and eliminate all the anti-social elements of society.

title: Bahubali 2: The Conclusion
desc: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.
